pr.title: More Dolphin SDK labels and splits
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Split several Dolphin SDK routines out of the large asm/dolphin/dolphin_sdk_1.s blob into module-specific assembly files and replaced many address-style labels with known SDK-style names. The PR primarily improved repository organization and symbol knowledge for Dolphin OS/cache/alloc/audio/arena/debugger/PPC helpers, while propagating renamed symbols through callsites, bss/sdata, include stubs, and obj_files.mk.

key_files.role: Large SDK assembly blob reduced by moving identified OS/cache/alloc/arena/audio code into separate files.
New split file for OS allocation routines, including OSAllocFromHeap, OSFreeToHeap, OSInitAlloc, OSCreateHeap, OSDestroyHeap, and OSCheckHeap labels.

New split file for cache routines, including DCEnable, DCInvalidateRange, DCFlushRange, DCStoreRange, DCFlushRangeNoSync, DCZeroRange, ICInvalidateRange, ICFlashInvalidate, ICEnable, and __OSCacheInit labels.
New split file for OSGetArenaHi, OSGetArenaLo, OSSetArenaHi, and OSSetArenaLo.
Renamed/moved debugger driver assembly from asm/dolphin/DebuggerDriver.s and relabeled key DBG routines.
Renamed SDK data labels such as HeapArray, NumHeaps, ArenaStart, ArenaEnd, and __OSArenaHi.
Renamed small-data SDK variables including __OSCurrHeap and __OSArenaLo.
Updated function declarations/comments to match newly identified SDK symbols.
Updated variable declarations/comments to match newly identified SDK globals.
Added new object entries for OSAlloc.o, OSArena.o, OSAudioSystem.o, and OSCache.o so the new splits are built.

what_changed: Moved substantial code out of asm/dolphin/dolphin_sdk_1.s into new module files under asm/dolphin/os/: OSAlloc.s, OSArena.s, OSAudioSystem.s, and OSCache.s.
Updated obj_files.mk to include the newly split objects: asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.o, OSArena.o, OSAudioSystem.o, and OSCache.o.
Renamed generic lbl_/func_ labels to known Dolphin SDK names across many existing assembly files.
Renamed asm/dolphin/DebuggerDriver.s to asm/dolphin/OdemuExi2/DebuggerDriver.s and labeled routines such as DBGEXIImm, DBGReadMailbox, DBGRead, and DBGWrite.
Renamed heap/arena globals in bss/sdata from address labels to SDK names, including HeapArray, NumHeaps, ArenaStart, ArenaEnd, __OSArenaHi, __OSCurrHeap, and __OSArenaLo.
Replaced callsites to cache routines with SDK names such as DCInvalidateRange in ar.s, AX.s, and other modules.
Replaced allocation callsites with OSAllocFromHeap and OSFreeToHeap in AX and sysdolphin baselib files.
Identified PPCArch helper labels including PPCMfl2cr, PPCMtl2cr, and PPCHalt.
Updated include/functions.h and include/variables.h to keep declarations/comments aligned with the new symbol names.
No PR body, issue comments, reviews, or review comments were present in the provided slice, so intent is inferred from title and diff only.
smart_moves: The PR split along known Dolphin SDK module boundaries instead of leaving identified routines in the generic dolphin_sdk_1.s blob, making future matching and C migration easier.
It propagated renamed symbols to every visible branch/callsite, not just the function definitions, preserving assembly readability and avoiding mixed old/new naming.

It paired data-label renames with code-label renames, which is important for allocator/arena code where globals such as __OSCurrHeap, __OSArenaHi, and __OSArenaLo are part of understanding the implementation.
It updated obj_files.mk in the same change as the assembly split, keeping the build graph consistent with the new file layout.
It used canonical SDK-style prefixes and casing where evident: OS*, __OS*, DC*, IC*, PPC*, and DBG*.
decomp_lessons: When an SDK blob has enough identified routines, split it by SDK library/module path before attempting full C decompilation; smaller module files make symbol review and later matching work more tractable.
A safe assembly split can be mostly mechanical: move contiguous identified ranges, add matching object entries, and preserve instruction bytes while only changing labels and references.
Known SDK names should be applied consistently to definitions, calls, globals, header stubs, and variable declarations to maximize project-wide searchability.

Allocator and arena work benefits from naming both functions and backing globals together, because variables such as HeapArray, NumHeaps, ArenaStart, ArenaEnd, __OSArenaHi, __OSArenaLo, and __OSCurrHeap explain callsite behavior.

Cache maintenance routines are heavily cross-referenced; once DCInvalidateRange or related cache labels are known, replacing all callsites immediately improves readability in unrelated systems such as AR and AX.
Path naming can encode SDK provenance: moving DebuggerDriver.s under asm/dolphin/OdemuExi2/ made the component ownership clearer than a flat asm/dolphin placement.

naming_conventions.lesson: Public Dolphin OS SDK routines use OS-prefixed PascalCase names.
Internal Dolphin OS symbols use a double-underscore __OS prefix.
Data-cache and instruction-cache routines are named with DC and IC prefixes.
Low-level PowerPC architecture helpers use PPC-prefixed names.
OdemuExi2 debugger-driver routines use DBG-prefixed names.
Some SDK data symbols are plain PascalCase globals rather than __OS-prefixed internals.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use symbol-only relabeling to improve assembly readability without changing instruction encodings.
After naming a function, update all direct branch-and-link references in dependent assembly files so callgraphs become searchable by SDK name.
Split monolithic assembly by creating new asm/dolphin/os/*.s files and subtracting the same code from the old aggregate file.
Keep small data and bss labels synchronized with known SDK variable names, especially when sda21 references appear at callsites.
Preserve file-specific assembly sections while moving code into module-specific object files, then register those object files in obj_files.mk.
Rename file paths to match SDK component hierarchy when evidence supports it, as with OdemuExi2/DebuggerDriver.s.
searchable_terms: More Dolphin SDK labels and splits
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that convert asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.s to C or add typed prototypes for OSAllocFromHeap and OSFreeToHeap.
Search for subsequent cleanup of include/functions.h comments for the newly labeled OS/cache/arena/audio routines.
Look for PRs that further split asm/dolphin/dolphin_sdk_1.s after OSAlloc, OSArena, OSAudioSystem, and OSCache were removed.
Search later history for typing of HeapArray, NumHeaps, ArenaStart, ArenaEnd, __OSArenaHi, __OSArenaLo, and __OSCurrHeap.
Find follow-up PRs touching asm/dolphin/OdemuExi2/DebuggerDriver.s or DBGEXIImm/DBGRead/DBGWrite.
